topic: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

sections.title: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Subject + V2 | was/were + V1+ing | had + V3 | had + been + V1+ing. Rules: Simple Past: completed action in the past (I ate rice) | Past Continuous: ongoing action at a past moment (I was eating rice) | Past Perfect: action completed before another past action (I had eaten rice before he came) | Past Perfect Continuous: ongoing action before a past moment (I had been eating rice for an hour)
sections.formula: Subject + V2 | was/were + V1+ing | had + V3 | had + been + V1+ing

examples.hindi: मैंने कल चावल खाया।
examples.english: I ate rice yesterday.

examples.hindi: जब वह आया, मैं खाना खा रहा था।
examples.english: I was eating food when he came.

examples.hindi: उसके आने से पहले मैं खाना खा चुका था।
examples.english: I had eaten food before he came.

examples.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से पढ़ रहा था।
examples.english: I had been studying for an hour.

examples.hindi: वह पिछले साल स्कूल गई थी।
examples.english: She went to school last year.

examples.hindi: जब मैं आया, वह काम कर रही थी।
examples.english: She was working when I arrived.

sections.title: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + V2 | was/were + V1+ing | had + V3 | had + been + V1+ing

examples.hindi: मेरे पहुँचने से पहले उसने काम खत्म कर लिया था।
examples.english: She had finished her work before I arrived.

examples.hindi: वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही थी।
examples.english: She had been working for two hours.

examples.hindi: वे कल स्कूल गए।
examples.english: They went to school yesterday.

examples.hindi: जब मैंने फोन किया, वे खेल रहे थे।
examples.english: They were playing when I called.

examples.hindi: मेरे बताने से पहले उन्होंने homework कर लिया था।
examples.english: They had done their homework before I told them.

examples.hindi: वे सुबह से खेल रहे थे।
examples.english: They had been playing since morning.

sections.title: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + V2 | was/were + V1+ing | had + V3 | had + been + V1+ing

examples.hindi: मैंने सुबह exercise की।
examples.english: I exercised in the morning.

examples.hindi: जब तुम आए, मैं पढ़ रहा था।
examples.english: I was reading when you came.

examples.hindi: तुम्हारे आने से पहले मैंने यह किताब पढ़ ली थी।
examples.english: I had read this book before you came.

examples.hindi: मैं तीन घंटे से यह किताब पढ़ रहा था।
examples.english: I had been reading this book for three hours.

sections.title: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous). Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Subject + V2 | was/were + V1+ing | had + V3 | had + been + V1+ing

examples.hindi: उसने पिछले हफ्ते एक गाना गाया।
examples.english: He sang a song last week.

examples.hindi: जब मैं आया, वह गा रहा था।
examples.english: He was singing when I arrived.

examples.hindi: मेरे आने से पहले उसने गाना गाया था।
examples.english: He had sung a song before I arrived.

examples.hindi: वह आधे घंटे से गा रहा था।
examples.english: He had been singing for half an hour.
